news-global-econ.title: United Arab Emirates Leaves OPEC amid Tensions over Production Caps and Iran
news-global-econ.description:
The United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced on Tuesday that its 59 years of membership in the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC) will come to an end, effective May 1.

news-global-econ.title: Gone in 9 Seconds: AI Coding Agent Deletes Entire Company Database and All Backups
news-global-econ.description:
The founder of a software company has issued a public warning after an AI coding assistant erased his company's entire production database and all backups in just nine seconds.

news-global-econ.title: Google Co-Founder Sergey Brin Shifts to the Right Thanks to 'Really Wonderful MAGA Girlfriend'
news-global-econ.description: Google co-founder Sergey Brin, whose company serves as the highwater mark of woke leftist hysteria in Silicon Valley, is now taking positions contrary to his left-wing peers, including standing against California's proposed wealth tax. He is reportedly been p…

news-global-econ.title: Amazon AWS launches AI-powered office tools to challenge Microsoft and Salesforce
news-global-econ.description: Amazon AWS launches AI-powered office tools using AI agents, aiming to compete with Microsoft and Salesforce in the $300 billion business software market.

news-global-econ.title: Trevor Bauer says no MLB team will sign him despite throwing a no-hitter and offering to play for free
news-global-econ.description: Former Cy Young Award winner Trevor Bauer says nothing he does feels sufficient to earn an MLB return, despite a seven-inning no-hitter on Sunday.

news-global-soc.title: Taylor Swift fires back at critics, says backlash was ‘huge fuel’ for her biggest hits
news-global-soc.description: Taylor Swift says criticism fueled major hits like "Blank Space" and "Antihero," turning public scrutiny of her dating life and personality into creative fuel.

news-global-soc.title: Five contestants emerge from 90 days of total isolation to face Gutfeld's real-vs-fake news challenge
news-global-soc.description: "What Did I Miss?" season 2 premieres as five new contestants emerge from 90 days of isolation to compete for $50,000 on Greg Gutfeld's game show.

news-global-soc.title: Trump hosts King Charles at White House as UK-US ties hit low point
news-global-soc.description: Trump and King Charles meet at the White House to reaffirm UK-US ties amid tensions, with the king set to address US Congress on global cooperation.

news-global-soc.title: Pentagon jumps from $225M to $55B on drones as cheap attacks overwhelm US defenses
news-global-soc.description: The Pentagon seeks roughly $55 billion for drone and autonomous warfare programs in its fiscal year 2027 budget, a dramatic surge from $225 million.
